name: kaola-workflow
description: Kaola-Workflow for Codex, a public repo-backed workflow pack with resumable phase artifacts, automated Codex agent profiles, roadmap mirroring, TDD execution, review, and finalization gates.

defaultPrompt: Use Kaola-Workflow for Codex in this repo.
